name: Fallen Sin
short_description: A fast-paced hack and slash game featuring endless wave-based combat. Cut down hordes of relentless monsters as they grow stronger and more numerous with each passing wave. Master your combat abilities, chain devastating combos, and adapt your strategy to survive increasingly brutal encounters.
detailed_description:
FallenSin

A fast-paced hack-and-slash game featuring endless wave-based combat. Cut down hordes of relentless monsters as they grow stronger and more numerous with each passing wave. Master your combat abilities, chain devastating combos, and adapt your strategy to survive increasingly brutal encounters.

Each wave brings new challenges as enemy types evolve and attack patterns intensify. Learn enemy behaviors, exploit weaknesses, and perfect your timing to stay alive. Your reflexes and decision-making will be tested as the battlefield becomes more chaotic and unforgiving.

Push your limits, refine your skills, and compete to reach the highest wave count in this ultimate test of endurance and skill. Every run is a chance to improve, break your personal record, and prove yourself against the endless onslaught. How long can you survive?
